fixture_notice: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN NON-EVIDENTIARY: bounded category rules for constructed cases only.

organization_k.cardinality: Exactly one primary label per admitted series.
organization_k.stability: The primary label remains stable for the series.
organization_k.change_rule: A use crossing primary labels requires a new or derived series.
organization_k.mixed_content_rule: Split the input into distinct series or retain one declared primary label with secondary annotations.
organization_k.working_rule: WORKING is an availability tier, not a primary label.

organization_r.cardinality: Zero, one, or multiple contextual roles may be recorded.
organization_r.change_rule: A role change caused only by context does not require a new object version.
organization_r.missing_context_rule: Do not assert a reproducible functional role when the required context tuple is absent.

scope_limit: These operational rules are local to this fixture and are not general necessary or sufficient conditions.
